name: todo-web-app
description: This is a simple todo list website built using the MERN stack. I utilised  [this tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F9gB5b4jgOI) to help in the construction  of this project, but built this todo list website instead of a note-taking website.

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
